extracted.summary: This document is the minutes of the Annual Ordinary Shareholders' Meeting of Fomento Económico Mexicano, S.A.B. de C.V., held on March 27, 2026, in Monterrey. The meeting was presided over by José Antonio Fernández Carbajal and certified by Secretary Alejandro Gil Ortiz, achieving a quorum of 89.60% of total shares. The agenda covered the approval of 2025 financial reports, dividend distribution, share buybacks, election of board members and committees, and tax compliance reports. The assembly approved the General Director's report, the Board's opinion, and the financial statements for the 2025 fiscal year.
extracted.raw_text:
ALEJANDRO GIL ORTIZ, Secretario del Consejo de Administración de FOMENTO ECONÓMICO MEXICANO, S.A.B. DE C.V., certifico que la presente es copia fiel y exacta del acta de la Asamblea General Ordinaria Anual de FOMENTO ECONÓMICO MEXICANO, S.A.B. de C.V. celebrada el día hoy.

Extiendo esta certificación en la ciudad de Monterrey, Nuevo León, el día 27 de marzo de 2026.

FOMENTO ECONÓMICO MEXICANO, S.A.B. DE C.V.

Alejandro Gil Ortiz
Secretario del Consejo de Administración

extracted.summary: Este documento presenta las Resoluciones Unánimes aprobadas fuera de Asamblea de Tenedores el 23 de febrero de 2026, relativas a los certificados bursátiles fiduciarios de proyectos de inversión (Series A a la I) emitidos por el Fideicomiso 6309 administrado por Banco Actinver. Las resoluciones tienen como objeto aprobar el aumento del Monto Total de la Emisión y la reapertura para la emisión de 2 Subseries Subsecuentes de Certificados, modificando y ampliando el alcance de resoluciones anteriores de diciembre de 2025. Se establece que estas resoluciones tienen la misma validez legal que si hubieran sido aprobadas en una Asamblea de Tenedores, contando con el consentimiento unánime de los tenedores que representan la totalidad de los Certificados en circulación con derecho a voto.
extracted.raw_text:

extracted.summary: This document presents unanimous resolutions approved outside of a bondholder meeting regarding trust certificates issued by Banco Actinver under trust contract 6309. It details various series (A through I) and subseries of certificates identified by ticker symbols such as GLOB1PI 22-2 through GLOB1PI 23-21. The primary resolution approves an increase in the total issuance amount by up to USD 540,000,000.00. Specifically, USD 365,000,000.00 is allocated for a reopening to increase the total amount of Series G, H, and I certificates, specifically Subseries G-7, H-7, and I-7. The document is dated February 23, 2026, and modifies previous resolutions from December 10, 2025.

extracted.summary: This document presents Unanimous Resolutions approved outside of a Bondholders' Meeting regarding fiduciary investment project securities (Series A through I) issued under Trust 6309. Dated February 23, 2026, the resolutions aim to approve an increase and reopening of the Total Issuance Amount and the issuance of two subsequent Subseries. The document lists all relevant ticker symbols (e.g., GLOB1PI 22, GLOB1PI 23) and identifies the key parties: Banco Actinver as Trustee, Lock Capital Solutions as Settlor, and Altor Casa de Bolsa as Common Representative. It explicitly states that these new resolutions modify and replace previous resolutions approved on December 10, 2025.

Dated February 23, 2026, the resolutions modify previous agreements from December 2025 and involve parties such as Lock Capital Solutions (Fideicomitente) and Aitor Casa de Bolsa (Representante Común). A key resolution approves increasing the Total Issuance Amount to up to USD 540,000,000.00, with USD 365,000,000.00 specifically allocated for a reopening to increase the total amount of Series G, H, and I certificates.

extracted.summary: This document contains unanimous resolutions approved outside of a shareholders' meeting on February 23, 2026, regarding fiduciary investment certificates (Series A through I) issued under trust 6309. The resolutions authorize an increase in the total issuance amount, the reopening of the issuance, the issuance of two subsequent subseries, and modifications to the issuance documents, effectively superseding previous resolutions from December 10, 2025. The involved parties include Banco Actinver as Trustee, Lock Capital Solutions as Settlor and Administrative Services Provider, and Altor Casa de Bolsa as Common Representative.

extracted.summary: Este documento presenta las Resoluciones Unánimes aprobadas fuera de asamblea por los tenedores de certificados bursátiles fiduciarios de proyectos de inversión (Series A a la I) emitidos por Banco Actinver como fiduciario. Las resoluciones modifican y amplían acuerdos anteriores aprobados el 10 de diciembre de 2025. Se aprueba aumentar el Monto Total de la Emisión hasta por USD$540,000,000.00, de los cuales USD$365,000,000.00 corresponden a una reapertura destinada a aumentar el monto de las Subseries G-7, H-7 e I-7. El fideicomiso subyacente es el número 6309 (anteriormente CIB/3831), constituido el 17 de febrero de 2022.

extracted.summary: This document presents the composition and theoretical value report for Fideicomiso F/4826 MEXTRAC 09 as of April 1, 2026. It details the portfolio holdings, listing 25 underlying issuers (such as AMX, WALMEX, FEMSA) along with their ISIN codes and the number of shares held. The report states that there are 309,000,000 certificates in circulation out of 4,000,000,000 issued, with a total theoretical trust value of approximately 20.85 billion MXN. The theoretical price per certificate is calculated at 67.4789 MXN.

extracted.summary: This document details the composition and theoretical value of the Minimum Conversion Unit and the theoretical price of FIBF certificates for Fideicomiso F/4825 FIBRATC 14 as of April 1, 2026. It reports 17,000,000 certificates in circulation out of 2,500,000,000 issued, with a total theoretical trust value of approximately 447 million MXN. The portfolio includes holdings in various real estate investment trusts (FIBRAs) such as DANHOS, FIBRAMQ, and FIBRAPL, along with a cash position.
